globalNews.title: Iran's supreme leader absent as senior officials attend ayatollah's funeral
globalNews.summary: Mojtaba Khamenei has not been seen in public since the attack which killed his father at the onset of the US-Israel war with Iran.

globalNews.title: US marks 250th birthday with fireworks, flyovers and extreme weather
globalNews.summary: US President Donald Trump's speech included some of his political agenda but also honoured war veterans and American history.

globalNews.title: Evacuations in Guam as super typhoon Bavi approaches
globalNews.summary: The storm is forecast to bring winds in excess of 160mph and waves nearly 11m high when it makes landfall on Monday.

globalNews.title: Australia probes mystery space balls that washed up on beach
globalNews.summary: Officials are searching for the origins of six pieces of space debris discovered on Forrest Beach in Queensland.

globalNews.title: Chinese underground church figure Jin Mingri freed from prison
globalNews.summary: The Zion Church founder's release comes after a direct plea to Xi Jinping from Donald Trump.

cryptoNews.title: South Africa proposes crypto tax guidance under existing framework
cryptoNews.summary: South Africa’s tax authority proposed draft guidance clarifying how crypto assets are taxed under existing income and capital gains tax rules, seeking public input until Aug. 31.

cryptoNews.title: Binance outflows triple to $1.2B as ETH withdrawals hit 3-year high
cryptoNews.summary: Binance recorded $1.23 billion in weekly net outflows, up 207% from the previous week, as Ethereum withdrawals surged to a three-year high.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Vitalik Buterin shares top priorities for new 'Lean Ethereum' strawmap
cryptoNews.summary: Part of the Ethereum Foundation’s plan to make Ethereum more private and scalable is to introduce a new virtual machine, with leanISA and RISC-V among the top candidates.

cryptoNews.title: Moonbeam to pivot from Polkadot to Base, unveils AI agent framework
cryptoNews.summary: Moonbeam didn’t provide a timeline for when it would launch the AI agent platform but told GLMR holders to bridge their tokens from the Polkadot parachain to Base before July 31.

aiNews.title: New Google commercial imagines a Declaration of Independence written with help from AI
aiNews.summary: Two hundred and fifty years after the signing of the Declaration of Independence, a new commercial asks: What if the Founding Fathers had access to Google Workspace?

aiNews.title: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
aiNews.summary: As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves.

aiNews.title: Alibaba reportedly bans employees from using Claude Code
aiNews.summary: Alibaba has reportedly classified Claude Code as high-risk software.

aiNews.title: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor
aiNews.summary: Mistral AI, which offers some open source AI models, has raised significant funding since its creation in 2023, with the ambition to “put frontier AI in the hands of everyone.”

aiNews.title: The only AI glossary you’ll need this year
aiNews.summary: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

Federal Reserve interest rate announcement and policy statement
